Metadata.title: Pauza — Focus & Digital Wellbeing App
Metadata.description: Block distracting apps with custom modes, NFC-powered physical unlock, smart schedules, and AI insights. Take back your time with Pauza.

Hero.headline: Take Back Your Time
Hero.subtitle: Block distracting apps, build focus habits, and take control of your screen time — with physical NFC unlocking that makes quitting intentional.

Features.heading: Everything You Need to Stay Focused

hardBlocking.title: Hard App Blocking
hardBlocking.description: Create custom blocking modes for work, study, or sleep. When a blocked app is opened, a full-screen shield takes over — no soft warnings, no easy bypasses.

nfcUnlock.title: Physical NFC Unlock
nfcUnlock.description: Link an NFC tag as your physical key to end focus sessions. Stopping requires a deliberate physical action, making quitting intentional — not impulsive.

schedules.title: Smart Schedules
schedules.description: Set automatic blocking schedules for each mode. Blocks start and end on time, even offline — no internet required for enforcement.

analytics.title: Usage Analytics
analytics.description: Track your screen time, app usage, daily streaks, and focus history. See hourly heatmaps, per-app breakdowns, and progress trends.

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.description: Get personalized usage analysis, addiction checks, and AI-suggested focus schedules. Understand your habits and get actionable recommendations.

friends.title: Friends & Leaderboard
friends.description: Add friends, compare streaks, and compete on the leaderboard. Stay accountable with social motivation and friendly competition.

step1.title: Create a Mode
step1.description: Set up a blocking mode — choose which apps to block, set pause rules, and pick your unlock method: NFC tag, QR code, or manual.

step2.title: Start a Session
step2.description: Activate your mode with one tap. Blocked apps are instantly shielded. Set a schedule to automate it.

step3.title: Stay Focused
step3.description: If you try to open a blocked app, a shield screen takes over. To stop early, scan your NFC tag — making the decision physical and intentional.

testimonial1.quote: Pauza completely changed how I manage my screen time. The NFC tag makes it so much harder to give in to distractions.
testimonial1.name: Alex K.

testimonial2.quote: I love the smart schedules. My phone automatically locks distracting apps during work hours. No willpower needed.
testimonial2.name: Maria S.

testimonial3.quote: The leaderboard with friends keeps me accountable. We compete to see who can stay focused the longest!
testimonial3.name: James L.

DownloadCta.heading: Ready to Take Back Your Time?
DownloadCta.subtitle: Download Pauza for free and start building healthier screen habits today.
